bird.name: 赭红尾鸲
bird.summary: 赭红尾鸲（学名：Phoenicurus ochruros）为鶲科红尾鸲属的鸟类。像其近親一樣，它過去被歸類於鶇科（Turdidae），但現在已知屬於舊世界鶲科（Muscicapidae）。 分類與系統學 1774年，德國博物學家薩繆爾·戈特利布·格梅林首次以雙名法Mottaci…

relations.subject: 赭红尾鸲
relations.evidence: They also winter on the south and east coasts of Ireland. The species originally inhabited stony ground in mountains, particularly cliffs, but since about 1900 has expanded to include similar urban habitats including bombed areas during and after World War II, and large industrial complexes that have the bare areas and cliff-like buildings it favours; in Great Britain, most of the small breeding population nests in such industrial areas
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。
